overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Legend of Zelda showing the character Link exploring a misty canyon environment. The character walks along grassy cliff edges, jumps down a waterfall, and wades through the pool at the bottom near ancient stone ruins.

agents.ego_description: standing on a grassy hilltop surveying the open landscape

entered.detail: rolling green hills extending into the distance
clusters of trees on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Link stands on a grassy hilltop under a clear sky, overlooking a vast landscape with distant forests and rolling hills.

events.description: scene shifts from clear hilltop to misty canyon environment with fog and cliffs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the grassy edge of a canyon cliff toward a distant waterfall

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face covered in patches of grass
steep rock wall rising on the right side
waterfall cascading down the canyon wall in the distance
ancient stone pillars visible near the waterfall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a misty canyon where Link walks along the grassy cliff edge. Tall rock walls rise on both sides shrouded in fog, with a waterfall and ancient stone ruins becoming visible ahead.

events.description: character jumps off the cliff edge and begins falling down alongside the waterfall

agents.ego_description: approaching the waterfall edge then jumping down into the canyon below, falling past rocky walls

entered.detail: water pool at the base of the waterfall

segments.scene_description: Link reaches the end of the trail at the waterfall's edge, looks down into the pool below, and jumps off the cliff, falling rapidly past the cascading water and rocky canyon walls.

events.description: lands in the shallow pool at the base of the waterfall
transition from falling to wading through water

agents.ego_description: landing in the pool and wading through the shallow water toward ancient ruins

entered.detail: shallow water covering the ground at the waterfall base
large stone pillars and ruins surrounding the pool
the bottom of the waterfall creating mist and spray

segments.scene_description: After landing in the shallow pool at the waterfall's base, Link wades through the water surrounded by mist and ancient stone ruins, with the waterfall cascading behind and large stone pillars rising on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a wide, sunlit hilltop into the depths of a misty, ruin-filled canyon. It begins with a panoramic view of distant forests and rolling hills under a clear sky before shifting toward a narrow cliffside path where tall rock walls rise through a dense fog. As the camera follows Link along the grassy edge, the environment tightens around a cascading waterfall and ancient stone ruins, leading to a sudden plunge off the cliff and a rapid descent past the rocky canyon walls. The scene finally opens up at the base of the falls, where the camera tracks Link as he wades through a shallow pool surrounded by mist and towering stone pillars.
